title: corchorus hirsutus
intro: Corchorus hirsutus, also known as hairy jute, is a plant species in the mallow family (Malvaceae) that is native to tropical Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corchorus hirsutus include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting digestive health. Corchorus hirsutus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional remedies such as tonics and salves.
